title: Carnivorous Plant
description: This datapack adds a new forest mob: carnivorous plant! Custom texture & animation, no resource pack required.
body:
# Carnivorous Plant



<details>
<summary>Preview of the carnivorous plant (gif quality may cause seizure)</summary>

![Carnivorous Plant preview (animation + model/texture)](https://i.imgur.com/lNSt13S.gif)

</details>




## Carnivorous plant behaviour

- Spawns in forest
- Can be killed easily
- Deals damage & gives poison
- Can't move
- Doesn't drop anything but you may often find meat from the last mob it ate near it
- Once killed, it despawns

## Design of the carnivorous plant

- Custom texture
- 3D model
- Animation

## Optimization

- All the carnivorous plants are killed each 95 seconds to prevent lag caused by spawn accumulation, but you can summon **persistent** carnivorous plant with **/function carnivorous_plant:summon_plant_persistent**
- Rare chance of finding one for performance reasons, but if you are curious about finding one in creative, run /scoreboard players reset @a timer_plant
- Once manually killed, it despawns

## Requirement

**Absolutely none!**
Fully server side, no resource pack required!
Mob spawning must be enabled

## Feedback/bug

[Send feedback/report bugs here](https://forms.gle/F9tsNmkmHtLZGBA28)
